body_excerpt: In hw_oem_imei_init of hw_oem_imei.c, there is a possible escalation of privilege due to hardware identifiers not being fused to OTP. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
